query:
SELECT 
  i.id,
  i.corretorId,
  u.name as corretorNome,
  i.tipo,
  i.createdAt
FROM interacoes i
LEFT JOIN users u ON i.corretorId = u.id
WHERE DATE(i.createdAt) = CURDATE()
ORDER BY i.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
